title: The Devil of Hells Kitchen
description: Become a Man without fear in Minecraft
body:
![Forge - TDOHK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2042b04a082354f1fefc75ed7ecdef7d9e98150.png)


_________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Thanks to this mod, you can become a **Daredevil**.

So far, this mod is under development and will be updated.

The mod is currently only for the **Forge**. Maybe someday this fashion will appear on the **Fabric**.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 📦 **What does this mod add?**

In order to become a Daredevil in Minecraft, you need to make a costume and a weapon. But before that, you need to create the ingredients for all of this.

Now it will be possible to repaint the iron in red and black.

![Creating rii](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc9944a6aed4752d210e73e2ecc3b066a1e07af1.png)

![Creating bii](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8ab507168aff1f76f355838fb913d09621de434.png)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

You can also make reinforced fabric specifically for the suit.

![cr rrf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9a234cf7e81c5aa7b8a6a82ae4b0d1f7aaec289.png)

![cr brf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c473cec192aeae43f76a48650e37f91e2d5fcbad.png)

![cr yrf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a1d42e1447ccb47c7831a7710294212bcbe09a.png)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

And finally, you can create a Daredevil costume. So far, there are four types of them.

### **1) Daredevil suit**

![cr d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb1e85c7d1ae02e0fcd34490d3dee436d7804bf5.png)
![crd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2da042abae74d835d6c9f23416337b96a1e1e28.png)
![crd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/582149cf0d30273f85e1fdce2a06c82d2bc8bbac.png)
![crd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ece63cba13aadd52bb9ff0d7a8c8110edd3e7bd2.png)

### **2) Daredevil suit (First appearance)**

### **3) Daredevil suit (Classic)**

### **4) Daredevil suit (Shadowland)**

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d98e647211550e1e13329221fb89c7c7d3a9f699.png)
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce266ccc0c6077ac76d2981ba2bf24528c27c0ba.png)

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d304d941e844de7f49078878eb8f4f54cda48347.png)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

How can you forget about the famous weapon of Daredevil - Batons.

In order to become the Devil of Hell's Kitchen, you need to make two clubs.

![в](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b7e7f39252b1ddbd53f1c61747e0f10ee875583.png)

Batons have several shapes.

They can be folded into a staff by **pressing the R button**, or by **pressing the G button** by making a club into a hook.

And also, when the clubs are in the state of the staff, they can be used as a shield. If the staff is in the left hand, you need **to click on the right mouse button** to defend yourself with it.

And it also goes in the opposite direction.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 📬 **How do I report mod errors?**

You can write about the Ronin mod in the "❗️-mod-bugs" channel on my Discord server. 

I will soon redo this server just into my own, so that I can write about all my mods and not make a new server every time. 

And BE SURE to write the name of the mod to determine which mod has a mistake.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 🤔 **Plans for the future of mod**

In the future, of course, I would like to add, first of all, the very blindness and the ability to resemble echolocation. 

And secondly, I would like to add costumes from the Netflix and Marvel Studio series.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 🌎 **Translations**

**There are languages in the mod:**

-Russian ☑️

-English ☑️
